product: Lakebase, a managed PostgreSQL OLTP database, is in Public Preview
tagline: Lakebase is an online transactional processing (OLTP) engine that is fully integrated with the Databricks Data Intelligence Platform.
what_it_does: Lakebase is an online transactional processing (OLTP) engine that is fully integrated with the Databricks Data Intelligence Platform. You can create a database instance, a new compute type, which provides dedicated, PostgreSQL compatible storage and compute, enabling you to run transactional workloads alongside your Lakehouse data. Lakebase is a fully managed Postgres database integrated into the Databricks platform.
why_it_matters: Build low latency apps: Connect Databricks Apps or any application to Lakebase for transactional workloads.
